name: Konstantinos Kalpakis
quote: Tests are incredibly hard and lectures don't prepare you. Office hours help but exams cover things never discussed in class.

name: Richard Chang
quote: Tough but fair. Exams are hard but follow the homework closely. Go to every class.

name: Marie desJardins
quote: Best professor in the department. Explains algorithms intuitively. Very approachable.

name: Tim Oates
quote: Makes AI genuinely exciting. Homework is involved but you actually learn. 10/10 would retake.

name: Penny Rheingans
quote: Data Structures is hard but she makes it manageable. Slides are clear, rubrics are fair.

name: Megan Squire
quote: Very organized class. Group projects are hit or miss depending on your team.
